meaning: adj.令人敬畏的,威严的n.八月(略作Aug) August 八月
examples: This place is lousy with tourists in August.
The player is contracted to play until August.
This is vital for Manhattanites in August, when the city becomes a steaming, belching, flesh-roasting hellpit.
In August, Motorola introduced a faster multimedia version of the RAZR, the RAZR 2.
